_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: mice harboring a germline Nf1 R1809C mutation with somatic loss of Nf1 in neuroglial progenitor cells...did not develop OPGs at 3 months of age (0/8)
resourceName: Nf1 c.5425 C > T ; Arg1809Cys-mutant mice
details: Nf1 f/1809 ; hGFAP-Cre mice did not develop OPGs at 3 months of age (0/8), while all Nf1 f/neo ; hGFAP-Cre mice developed OPGs (6/6)
